name: MaterialRefs
summary: If you are developing a high quality plug-in renderer, and a user is assigning a custom render material to this object, then add rendering material information to the MaterialRefs dictionary. Note to developers: As soon as the MaterialRefs dictionary contains items rendering material queries slow down. Do not populate the MaterialRefs dictionary when setting the MaterialIndex will take care of your needs.

methods.name: Add(KeyValuePair<Guid, MaterialRef>)
methods.summary: Adds an item to this dictionary.

params.name: item
params.doc: The object to add to this dictionary

methods.name: Add(Guid, MaterialRef)
methods.signature: public void Add(Guid key, MaterialRef value)
methods.summary: Add or replace an element with the provided key and value to this dictionary.

params.name: key
params.doc: The plug-in associated with this MaterialRef

params.name: value
params.doc: MaterialRef to add to this dictionary

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Removes all items from this dictionary.

methods.name: Contains
methods.summary: Determines whether this dictionary contains a specific value.

params.name: item
params.doc: The object to locate in this dictionary.

returns.doc: true if item is found in this dictionary; otherwise, false.

methods.name: ContainsKey
methods.summary: Determines whether this dictionary contains an MaterialRef with the specified plug-in id.

params.name: key
params.doc: The plug-in Id used to locate a MaterialRef in this dictionary.

returns.doc: true if this dictionary contains an element with the specified plug-in Id; otherwise, false.

methods.name: CopyTo
methods.signature: public void CopyTo(KeyValuePair<Guid, MaterialRef>[] array, int arrayIndex)
methods.summary: Copies the elements of this dictionary to an System.Array, starting at a particular System.Array index.

params.name: array
params.doc: The one-dimensional System.Array that is the destination of the elements copied from this dictionary. The System.Array must have zero-based indexing.

params.name: arrayIndex
params.doc: The zero-based index in array at which copying begins.

throws.when: The number of elements in the source dictionary is greater than the available space from arrayIndex to the end of the destination array.

methods.name: Create
methods.summary: Call this method to create a MaterialRef which can be used when calling one of the Add methods.

params.name: createParams
params.doc: Values used to initialize the MaterialRef

returns.doc: A temporary MaterialRef object, the caller is responsible for disposing of this object.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through this dictionary.

returns.doc: A IEnumerator that can be used to iterate this dictionary.

methods.name: Remove(Guid)
methods.summary: Removes the MaterialRef with the specified plug-in Id from this dictionary.

params.name: key
params.doc: The plug-in Id for the MaterialRef to remove.

returns.doc: true if the MaterialRef is successfully removed; otherwise, false. This method also returns false if key was not found in the original dictionary.

methods.name: Remove(KeyValuePair<Guid, MaterialRef>)
methods.summary: Removes the element with the specified plug-in id from the this dictionary.

params.name: item
params.doc: The object to remove from this dictionary

methods.name: TryGetValue
methods.signature: public bool TryGetValue(Guid key, out MaterialRef value)
methods.summary: Gets the value associated with the specified key.

params.name: key
params.doc: The plug-in Id whose MaterialRef to get.

params.name: value
params.doc: When this method returns, the MaterialRef associated with the specified key, if the key is found; otherwise, null. This parameter is passed uninitialized.

returns.doc: true if this dictionary contains a MaterialRef with the specified key; otherwise, false.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of elements contained in this dictionary

properties.name: IsReadOnly
properties.summary: IDictionary required property, always returns false for this dictionary.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the element with the specified plug-in Id.

properties.name: Keys
properties.summary: Gets an ICollection containing the plug-in Id's in this dictionary.

properties.name: Values
properties.summary: Gets an ICollection containing the MaterialRef objects in this dictionary.
